notes: v0.15.1 — Active Skills + Cosmetics + BOSS KEYS shop. 3 active-skill slots per class trigger with keys 1/2/3 during matches (OVERCLOCK / AEGIS BURST / DAMAGE SURGE / SPEED SURGE / HEAL PULSE / EMP PULSE / SHARD STORM / BLINK) with HUD widget showing CDs. Per-class cosmetic skin selection — projectile / trail / shield colors cycle in MODULES page (3 starter skins each, unlocked by default). Legendary modules redesigned for 1v1 + multi: HIGH NOON CORE → TWIN PULSE (always +1 projectile + 6% dmg), ECHO CORE → CHAIN CRIT (crits hit 2nd enemy at 60%). BOSS KEYS shop tab fully ported with 4 bundles (1/5/10/25 keys, bulk discount up to −28%) + 2 timed specials (50-key PULSE / 15-key SURGE). Windows only.
